year: The year in which the verification of departmental procedure documents was performed.
department: The department for which the procedure documents were verified. This could be HR, Operations, or any other department within the company.
documents_verified: The number of departmental procedure documents that were verified by the knowledge management lead.
verification_status: The status of verification, represented as a string. This could be 'completed', 'in-progress', 'not started', etc.
verification_lead: The name of the knowledge management lead who was responsible for verifying the departmental procedure documents.
